---
title: "Data Export"
subtitle: A dataset file exported from the pilot database
---

The data file was created for the initial analysis using the ICES-DOME data.

## Data Availability

A tab-delimited file containing all major data from the database is available for download at the following location.

 * [pilot_ices_dome.tsv.gz](https://github.com/seafood-hazards/ices-dome-pilot/releases/download/v0.1.0/pilot_ices_dome.tsv.gz)

## Data File Summary

The file `pilot_ices_dome.tsv.gz` is a denormalized (flat) export of the relational database, designed to facilitate immediate analysis without requiring complex SQL joins.

## Column Definition

```{r}
library(tibble)

exported_columns_tbl <- tibble(
  `Column Name` = c(
    # Project metadata
    "project_id", "project", "country",

    # Site metadata
    "site_id", "longitude", "latitude", "dist_to_coast",
    "est_country", "country_code", "municipality", "sea_name",

    # Parameter metadata
    "param", "param_description",

    # Sample metadata
    "year", "date", "sample_type", "sample_type_description",

    # Sediment depth / sub-sample index
    "depth_from", "depth_to", "sediment_no",

    # Measurement
    "value", "unit", "basis", "qflag", "vflag", "metcu",

    # Detection limits & uncertainty
    "lod", "loq", "uncrt",

    # Analysis method
    "labo", "metst", "metpt", "metps", "metcx", "metoa"
  ),

  `Source Table` = c(
    "project", "project", "project",
    "site", "site", "site", "site",
    "site", "site", "site", "site",
    "parameter", "parameter",
    "sample", "sample", "sample", "sample",
    "sediment", "sediment", "sediment",
    "sediment", "sediment", "sediment", "sediment", "sediment", "sediment",
    "lld", "lld", "sediment",
    "analysis_method", "analysis_method", "analysis_method",
    "analysis_method", "analysis_method", "analysis_method"
  ),

  `Type` = c(
    "INTEGER", "TEXT", "TEXT",
    "INTEGER", "REAL", "REAL", "REAL",
    "TEXT", "TEXT", "TEXT", "TEXT",
    "TEXT", "TEXT",
    "INTEGER", "TEXT", "TEXT", "TEXT",
    "REAL", "REAL", "INTEGER",
    "REAL", "TEXT", "TEXT", "TEXT", "TEXT", "TEXT",
    "REAL", "REAL", "REAL",
    "TEXT", "TEXT", "TEXT", "TEXT", "TEXT", "TEXT"
  ),

  `Description` = c(
    "Surrogate key linking to the project table.",
    "Monitoring programme code(s), e.g. CEMP or CEMP~NATL.",
    "Country name of the reporting institute.",
    "Surrogate key linking to the site table.",
    "Longitude coordinate (decimal degrees).",
    "Latitude coordinate (decimal degrees).",
    "Distance from the station to the nearest coastline (km).",
    "Estimated country derived from station coordinates.",
    "ISO country code, e.g. NO, DK.",
    "Municipality name.",
    "Name of the sea or coastal water body.",
    "ICES parameter code, e.g. HG, CD.",
    "Full name or description of the parameter.",
    "Year of sampling.",
    "Full sampling date (format DD/MM/YYYY).",
    "Sample type code, e.g. GC (grab/core).",
    "Full description of the sample type.",
    "Upper boundary of the sampled sediment layer (m).",
    "Lower boundary of the sampled sediment layer (m).",
    "Sequential sub-sample index within a sample–parameter combination.",
    "Measured concentration or numerical result.",
    "Unit of measurement, e.g. ug/kg or %.",
    "Basis of measurement code, e.g. D (dry weight).",
    "Data quality flag code(s), e.g. < (below detection limit).",
    "Validity flag code(s).",
    "Concentration unit code for the reported value.",
    "Limit of Detection (LOD) value.",
    "Limit of Quantification (LOQ) value.",
    "Measurement uncertainty.",
    "Analysing laboratory code.",
    "Sample storage method code.",
    "Pre-treatment method code.",
    "Sub-sampling method code.",
    "Extraction / clean-up method code.",
    "Analytical technique code, e.g. ICP-MS, AAS-GF."
  )
)

exported_columns_tbl

```
